scripts.electron: npm run build:electron && mkdir -p dist-electron/sync && cp electron/sync/syncStore.cjs dist-electron/sync/syncStore.cjs && cp electron/sync/fileWatcher.cjs dist-electron/sync/fileWatcher.cjs && cp electron/preload.cjs dist-electron/preload.cjs && cp electron/sync/syncLock.cjs dist-electron/sync/syncLock.cjs && electron .
scripts.dist:mac: npm run build && npm run build:electron && mkdir -p dist-electron/sync && cp electron/sync/syncStore.cjs dist-electron/sync/syncStore.cjs && cp electron/sync/fileWatcher.cjs dist-electron/sync/fileWatcher.cjs && cp electron/preload.cjs dist-electron/preload.cjs && cp electron/sync/syncLock.cjs dist-electron/sync/syncLock.cjs && electron-builder --mac dmg
